en: 🎵Yeah, it's like that🎵 🎵I got a new man, he's waiting out back🎵 🎵Now what? What you think about that?🎵
ko: 이제 어쩔 건데, 그걸 생각할 수 없어?

en: 🎵Now, when I say I'm through, I'm through🎵 🎵Basically, I'm through with you🎵
ko: 내가 끝났다고 말할 때, 정말 끝났어

en: 🎵What you wanna say? I had to have it your way🎵 🎵Had to play games🎵 🎵Now you're begging me to stay🎵
ko: 너의 방식대로 해야 했어, 게임을 해야 했어

en: 🎵There you go, looking pitiful🎵 🎵Just because I let you go🎵
ko: 봐, 안타까워 보이네, 내가 너를 놓아줬다고

en: 🎵There you go, talking about you want me back🎵 🎵But sometimes it be like that🎵
ko: 봐, 나를 다시 원한다고 말하고 있어

en: 🎵So, there you go, talking about you miss me so🎵 🎵That you love me, so I let you go🎵
ko: 너가 나를 사랑한다고, 그래서 내가 너를 놓아줬어

en: 🎵There you go, cause your life's not over🎵 🎵So, there you go🎵
🎵Please don't come around talking about how you changed🎵 🎵How you said goodbye to what's-her-name🎵
ko: 네가 누구라고 했는지와 작별했다고 말한 거

en: 🎵All it sounds like to me is new game🎵
🎵And I was right when I thought I'd be much better off without you🎵
ko: 너 없이 훨씬 더 잘 지낼 수 있을 거라고 생각했을 때 맞았어

en: 🎵Had to get myself around you🎵 🎵Cause my life was all about you🎵
🎵So, you say you wanna talk, I don't🎵 🎵Say you wanna change, I won't🎵 🎵Yeah, it's like that🎵
ko: 그래서 너는 이야기하고 싶다고 말하지만, 나는 원하지 않아

en: 🎵Had your chance, won't take it back🎵 🎵Now what, what you think about that?🎵
